methodology.title: Our Methodology
methodology.text: The PREIO framework eliminates retail speculation. Every asset is audited across six institutional dimensions—Legal, Connectivity, Infrastructure, Liquidity, Growth, and Risk—to generate a definitive Investment Grade score.

authority.title: Institutional Authority
authority.text: PREIO operates as a Strategic Advisory Office, not a brokerage. We do not sell properties; we aggregate intelligence to secure capital and maximize the strategic legacy of our HNW partners.
